basic_details.job_title: BRIC THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Staff Nurse, Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute
basic_details.short_information: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (BRIC THSTI) Staff Nurse, Research Assistant & Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (https://thsti.res.in). A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the BRIC THSTI Staff Nurse, Research Assistant & Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Staff Nurse and Research Assistant, Max 50 years for Technician.
age_limit.details: Staff Nurse: Maximum age 35 years. Research Assistant: Maximum age 35 years. Technician: Maximum age 50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: GNM/B.Sc. (Nursing), B.Sc. (Nursing) or Diploma in Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) or ANM, B.Sc./DMLT or 12th with 3 years experience
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: GNM / B.Sc. (Nursing) from a recognised University with experience in Clinical training in antenatal care with skills relevant to maternal health. Research Assistant: B.Sc. (Nursing) or Health related discipline from a recognized University OR Diploma in Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) or ANM or equivalent from a recognized university, with one (1) year of post-qualification experience in the relevant field. Technician: B.Sc./ DMLT from a recognised University OR Standard 12th with Science stream minimum three (3) years post-qualification experience in clinical trials/ health-related research projects.

all_official_links.label: Download BRIC THSTI Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.translational_health_science_and_technol: GNM/B.Sc. (Nursing), B.Sc. (Nursing) or Diploma in Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) or ANM, B.Sc./DMLT or 12th with 3 years experience
Max 35 years for Staff Nurse and Research Assistant, Max 50 years for Technician.

content_sections.heading: BRIC THSTI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BRIC THSTI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BRIC THSTI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BRIC THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Staff Nurse: GNM / B.Sc. (Nursing) from a recognised University with experience in Clinical training in antenatal care with skills relevant to maternal health. Research Assistant: B.Sc. (Nursing) or Health related discipline from a recognized University OR Diploma in Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) or ANM or equivalent from a recognized university, with one (1) year of post-qualification experience in the relevant field. Technician: B.Sc./ DMLT from a recognised University OR Standard 12th with Science stream minimum three (3) years post-qualification experience in clinical trials/ health-related research projects.

content_sections.heading: BRIC THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Staff Nurse: Maximum age 35 years. Research Assistant: Maximum age 35 years. Technician: Maximum age 50 years.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for BRIC THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for BRIC THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the BRIC THSTI recruitment is scheduled for 23rd July 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in this BRIC THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: BRIC THSTI is hiring for the posts of Staff Nurse, Research Assistant, and Technician in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: For the Staff Nurse position, candidates should possess a GNM or B.Sc. (Nursing) qualification from a recognized university and have experience in antenatal care.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Technician post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technician post is 50 years. For Staff Nurse and Research Assistant, the maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected Research Assistant will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 32,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are there in total for this BRIC THSTI recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for this BRIC THSTI recruitment drive across all the mentioned posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this BRIC THSTI recruitment is Walk-in. Interested candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve a written test, a skill test, and an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at THSTI, NCR Biotech Science Cluster, 3rd Milestone, Faridabad-Gurugram Expressway, Faridabad - 121001.
